case_for: Allen has posted three 20+ point performances in his last six games and carries a strong 20.2 pt consensus projection, showing he remains a high-target, high-upside option when healthy and featured.
case_against: His week-to-week volatility (as low as 6.0 and 8.1 pts) shows he can easily fall short of 12.0 if target share dips or game script turns unfavorable.
